zh.Kingdom of Northumbria: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴
zh.lifeSummary: 當Maldred of Allerdale於大約1009年出生在英國諾圖恩布利亞時，他的父親Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl32歲，母親Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda27歲。他於1036年與Ealdgyth of Northumbria在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1060年在他的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maldred of Allerdale于大约1009年出生在英国諾圖恩布利亞时，他的父亲Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl32岁，母亲Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda27岁。他于1036年与Ealdgyth of Northumbria在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1060年在他的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Maldred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name Mildþrӯð, derived from mild ‘gentle’ + þrӯð ‘strength’. This was the name of a 7th-century abbess, who had a less famous but equally saintly elder sister called Mildburh and a younger sister called Mildgӯð; all were daughters of a certain Queen Ermenburh . Their names illustrate clearly the Old English pattern of combining and recombining the same small group of name elements within a single family. This name was in fairly regular localized use until the early 18th century and it enjoyed a strong revival throughout England in the 19th century. Its use declined from the 1930s onwards.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Maldred of Allerdale was born about 1009, in Northumbria, England, his father, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, was 32 and his mother, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, was 27. He married Ealdgyth of Northumbria in 1036, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1060, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maldred of Allerdale est né environ 1009, à Northumbria, Angleterre, son père, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Ealdgyth of Northumbria en 1036, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1060, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maldred of Allerdale um 1009 in Northumbria, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl 32 und seine Mutter Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda 27. Er hat 1036 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Ealdgyth of Northumbria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1060 im Alter von 52 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maldred of Allerdale è nato il circa 1009 nel Northumbria, England, il suo padre, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Ealdgyth of Northumbria nel 1036, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1060, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maldred of Allerdaleが約1009年にイギリスノースウンブリアで生まれた時，父Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Athollは32歳，母Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináedaは27歳であった。1036年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドでEaldgyth of Northumbriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1060年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maldred of Allerdale(이)가 대략 1009년 영국 노르스브리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1036년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 Ealdgyth of Northumbria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1060년 그의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Perthshire, Scotland: Siorrachd Pheairt, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maldred of Allerdale nasceu aproximadamente 1009, em Northumbria, Inglaterra, seu pai, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Ealdgyth of Northumbria em 1036, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1060, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maldred of Allerdale родился около 1009 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия, его отцу по имени Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Ealdgyth of Northumbria в 1036 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1060 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maldred of Allerdale nació aproximadamente 1009, en Northumbria, Inglaterra, su papá, Crínán of Dunkeld Mormaer of Atholl, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Bethóc ingen Maíl Coluim meic Cináeda, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Ealdgyth of Northumbria en 1036, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1060, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
